title: DocsSearchIndexFile
description: Build artifact emitted by apps/lfx-one/scripts/build-docs.mjs and shipped as /assets/docs/search-index.json. Lazy-loaded by DocsSearchService on first interaction with the search field. Schema-versioned independently of the manifest.

schemaVersion.description: Bumped on incompatible search-index file shape changes (independent of MiniSearch version).

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the index was generated.

miniSearch.description: MiniSearch's native serialized form. Loaded via MiniSearch.loadJSON() at runtime. Opaque to this schema; treat as 'whatever MiniSearch.toJSON() emitted'.

entries.description: Original search entries kept alongside the MiniSearch index for snippet generation post-match. Keyed by slug.

id.description: MiniSearch document id; equal to the article slug.

headings.description: Joined heading text (H1-H4). Indexed with field boost 2.

body.description: Plain-text body (HTML stripped). Indexed with field boost 1.

tags.description: Joined tag list. Indexed with field boost 2.

topic.description: Stored, not indexed for search. Available for client-side facet filtering.
